items.title: NEW: John Tonje has been one of the Celtics' biggest Summer League standouts.
items.author: Noa Dalzell
items.body_excerpt:
NEW: John Tonje has been one of the Celtics' biggest Summer League standouts. 

There were questions about his defense, but his head coach thinks he's answered them: 

"He’s given himself a really good chance. He is definitely an NBA player.”
www.celticsblog.com/boston-celti...

media.title: Celtics Summer League standout just showed why he has ‘delusional’ confidence
media.description: John Tonje has earned the praise of his coaches and teammates. He may have done just enough in Summer League to show he belongs in the NBA.

items.title: Williams just delivered a dime to a cutting John Tonje, feeding him in stride for a layup.
items.author: Bobby Krivitsky
items.body_excerpt:
Williams just delivered a dime to a cutting John Tonje, feeding him in stride for a layup.

It was exactly the type of alley-oop for a layup you see Jokic and Murray execute all the time. Obviously, I'm comparing the play, not the players.

items.title: John Tonje utilizes a deceleration step to get a layup, then buries a corner 3. He's had a nice showing here at Summer League.
items.author: Bobby Krivitsky
items.body_excerpt:
John Tonje utilizes a deceleration step to get a layup, then buries a corner 3. He's had a nice showing here at Summer League.

As far as internal candidates go, Tonje is a front-runner for what may be the Celtics' only available two-way spot.

1/2

items.title: The Boston Celtics did not tender qualifying offers to Max Shulga or John Tonje, a league source told @spotrac.
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
The Boston Celtics did not tender qualifying offers to Max Shulga or John Tonje, a league source told @spotrac.

Both Shulga and Tonje will be unrestricted free agents this offseason.
